wine_retailers.name: Garrafeira do Carmo
wine_retailers.description: A century-old garrafeira nicknamed the cathedral of Port, stocking harvests and Vintage Ports back to 1834 plus a rare and precious private-collection room.
wine_retailers.speciality: Vintage and Colheita Port verticals, rare back-vintages, Douro DOC wines

wine_retailers.name: Garrafeira Nacional (Flores)
wine_retailers.description: The Porto branch of Portugal's historic wine and spirits merchant, on pedestrian Rua das Flores, with deep stocks of aged Port and Douro DOC wines.
wine_retailers.speciality: Aged Tawny and Vintage Port, Douro DOC reds, collectible Portuguese back-vintages

wine_retailers.name: Porto Wine House
wine_retailers.address: Rua Cândido dos Reis 10, 4400-069 Vila Nova de Gaia, Portugal
wine_retailers.description: A multibrand wine and Port shop in central Gaia with a river view, carrying a broad Douro and Port range plus other Portuguese regions, with online delivery.
wine_retailers.speciality: Port and Douro DOC wines, multibrand Portuguese selection, online shipping

verified.address_quoted: Rua Cândido dos Reis, 10 4400-069 V.N. Gaia

wine_retailers.name: Garrafeira Soares (São João)
wine_retailers.address: Rua de S. João 70, 4050-552 Porto, Portugal
wine_retailers.description: A branch of the long-running Soares merchant in the Ribeira, stocking many years and brands of Port plus Douro wines, with bottles also sold by the glass.
wine_retailers.speciality: Port across multiple vintages, Douro DOC wines, Portuguese spirits

verified.address_quoted: R. de S. João, nº70 4050-552 Porto

wine_retailers.name: Gota a Gota Wine House
wine_retailers.description: An independent Cedofeita wine shop with a curated Portuguese range strong on Douro and Port, including small-grower and aguardente bagaceira bottlings.
wine_retailers.speciality: Douro DOC reds, grower Port, Portuguese spirits including aguardente bagaceira
